seo.title: Lifestyle Medicine Resources | Dr. Beth Motley, MD
seo.description: Evidence-based tools and guides organized around the six pillars of lifestyle medicine. Free, vetted resources curated by Dr. Beth Motley, FACLM.

hero.headline: Tools & Guides
hero.subheadline: Free, vetted resources organized around the six pillars of lifestyle medicine, curated by Dr. Beth.

resources.title: PCRM 21-Day Vegan Kickstart
resources.description: A structured 21-day whole food plant-based program with meal plans and recipes. One of the most effective on-ramps for patients new to plant-based eating.

resources.title: NutritionFacts.org Daily Dozen
resources.description: Dr. Michael Greger's free app for tracking the 12 healthiest food groups each day. Simple, evidence-based, and habit-forming in the best way.

resources.title: NutritionFacts.org Evidence-Based Eating Guide
resources.description: A comprehensive hub of free guides, videos, and tools from NutritionFacts.org, organized by health topic and backed by peer-reviewed research.

resources.title: Full Plate Living
resources.description: A free, ACLM-certified program focused on adding more high-fiber whole foods to meals you already eat. Not strictly WFPB, but an excellent, evidence-backed starting point for patients earlier in their journey.

resources.title: Forks Over Knives: Recipes & Guides
resources.description: Practical recipes and guides from the documentary that has introduced more people to plant-based eating than any other resource.

resources.title: CDC Healthy Eating for Adults
resources.description: Plain-language, government-backed guidance on building a healthy eating pattern, useful for patients who want foundational, no-fuss nutrition information.

resources.title: Move Your Way: U.S. Physical Activity Guidelines
resources.description: The federal campaign translating U.S. Physical Activity Guidelines into practical, personalized tools. Great for patients wanting to understand the minimum effective dose of movement.

resources.title: Exercise is Medicine - ACSM
resources.description: The American College of Sports Medicine's platform connecting movement to chronic disease management. Includes patient handouts and a provider toolkit.

resources.title: CDC Physical Activity Basics
resources.description: Clear, evidence-based guidance on how much physical activity adults need and how to get started, straightforward and jargon-free.

resources.title: NutritionFacts.org: Exercise Topic
resources.description: An accessible, research-based review of the exercise literature, covering walking targets, resistance training, and more.

resources.title: CDC Sleep Resources
resources.description: Government-backed guides on sleep health, sleep disorders, and the relationship between sleep and chronic disease.

resources.title: NHLBI: Healthy Sleep
resources.description: The National Heart, Lung, and Blood Institute's comprehensive resource on sleep health, covering why sleep matters, how much you need, and what disrupts it.

resources.title: Sleep Foundation: CBT-I Guide
resources.description: A clear, patient-friendly guide to Cognitive Behavioral Therapy for Insomnia, the first-line, non-medication treatment for chronic insomnia with strong clinical evidence.

resources.title: CBT-i Coach App
resources.description: A free VA-developed app guiding patients through CBT-I protocols on iOS and Android. Clinician-validated and a strong recommendation for anyone struggling with insomnia.

resources.title: UMass MBSR Program
resources.description: The original 8-week Mindfulness-Based Stress Reduction program, available online. The most evidence-backed behavioral intervention for chronic stress and anxiety.

resources.title: Insight Timer
resources.description: The largest free meditation library available. Ideal for patients who want guided practice without a subscription commitment.

resources.title: MentalHealth.gov: Coping with Stress
resources.description: Plain-language, government-backed guidance on recognizing stress and building healthy coping strategies.

resources.title: NIH: Stress & Your Health
resources.description: The National Center for Complementary and Integrative Health's evidence summary on stress, covering mind-body approaches with strong research support.

resources.title: Rethinking Drinking - NIAAA
resources.description: The National Institute on Alcohol Abuse's interactive tool for assessing alcohol use and understanding its health effects. Content is stable and evidence-based.

resources.title: Smokefree.gov
resources.description: A comprehensive smoking cessation platform with personalized quit plans, text support, and evidence-based apps for iOS and Android.

resources.title: CDC: Alcohol & Public Health
resources.description: The CDC's evidence summary on alcohol use and public health, covering consumption patterns, health risks, and recommended limits.

resources.title: SAMHSA: Find Treatment
resources.description: A government-run locator for substance use treatment programs across the U.S., free, confidential, and available 24/7.

resources.title: Surgeon General's Advisory on Loneliness
resources.description: The U.S. Surgeon General's landmark report on the loneliness epidemic, includes downloadable fact cards, individual recommendations, and a National Strategy to Advance Social Connection.

resources.title: Blue Zones - Dan Buettner
resources.description: Research and practical guides from the world's longest-lived communities, where social connection and purpose are universal threads of daily life.

resources.title: VIA Character Strengths Survey
resources.description: A validated, free assessment helping patients identify their core strengths, a useful entry point for conversations about purpose, meaning, and wellbeing.

resources.title: MedlinePlus: Social Health
resources.description: NIH's plain-language overview of social health, covering loneliness, social connection, and their effects on physical and mental wellbeing.

aclm.title: Official ACLM Resources
aclm.subtitle: From the American College of Lifestyle Medicine

items.title: ACLM Patient Resources
items.description: Educational materials and tools for patients interested in lifestyle medicine.

items.title: Find a Lifestyle Medicine Physician
items.description: Search the ACLM directory for board-certified lifestyle medicine physicians near you.

items.title: Lifestyle Medicine Evidence
items.description: The evidence base and clinical guidelines supporting lifestyle medicine interventions.

providers.title: Clinical Tools & Training
providers.subtitle: Resources for clinicians and learners looking to incorporate lifestyle medicine into practice.

items.title: Teaching Aids & Handouts
items.description: A curated collection of patient handouts and teaching materials available for public use, free to download and adapt for your own practice.

items.title: Getting Into Lifestyle Medicine
items.description: Dr. Beth's interview with the American College of Lifestyle Medicine covering pathways into the field, how she structured her practice, and what to expect, essential viewing for students and residents considering a lifestyle medicine career.

newsletter.title: Get my latest resource additions
newsletter.description: I update this page regularly as new evidence emerges. Subscribe to be notified.
